info.title: Task API
info.description: API для керування задачами: створення, оновлення, пошук, видалення та зміна статусу.

value.message: User created. Please check your email to verify.

400.description: Validation error in request body (validateBody middleware)

post.summary: Register a new user and create an associated organization

201.description: User and Organization created, verification email sent

value.message: Organization account created. Please verify your email.

409.description: Conflict - User or Organization already exists

value.message: Organization with this name already exists

400.description: Invalid email or password (AUTH_INVALID_CREDENTIALS) or body validation error
No refresh token provided in cookies

get.summary: Verify user email by verification code

200.description: Email already verified or successfully verified
Email already verified OR verification email resent

value.message: Verification email resent. Please check your inbox.

401.description: Unauthorized (no user on request, invalid/expired token)

post.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token

401.description: Refresh token missing or invalid in cookies

403.description: Refresh token invalid or revoked in DB

404.description: User not found during token refresh

message.example: Reset password email sent, check your inbox

404.description: User not found for given email

parameters.name: resetPasswordToken
parameters.description: Reset password token from email link

400.description: Missing reset token, invalid reset code, or validation error

message.example: Reset password email resent, check your inbox

404.description: User not found for given email

500.description: Server error while sending the contact form

get.description: Returns 200 OK if the application process is running. Used by Docker/K8s to decide if the container needs a restart.
Verifies if the application is ready to handle traffic by checking the database connection (Prisma).

post.summary: Create a join request (senderId from token)

get.summary: Get all pending join requests for a specific organization
get.description: Returns a list of pending requests where the organization is the receiver. Accessible only by ADMIN or MODERATOR.

get.summary: Get details of a pending join request
get.description: Returns join request details. Accessible by the sender or organization staff (ADMIN/MODERATOR).

403.description: Forbidden - You don't have access to this request

content.example: View the latest technology headlines, gadget and smartphone trends, and insights from tech industry leaders.

400.description: Post with such title already exists

500.description: Server error while creating a post

200.description: Successfully get a list of posts

500.description: Server error while fetching the post
Server error while updating the post
Server error while deleting the post

post.description:
Creates a review from the authenticated user to another user.
The author cannot review themselves.

400.description: Bad request (for example, user tries to review themselves)

409.description: User has already left a review for this user

post.description: Creates a review from the authenticated user to an organization.

409.description: User has already left a review for this organization

post.description:
Creates a review from the authenticated user about the platform.
Platform is identified by a server-side configuration (PLATFORM_ID).

404.description: Platform not configured or not found

409.description: User has already left a review for the platform

post.description:
Creates a review from the task host to a task participant.
Only the host of the task is allowed to create such reviews.

400.description: Bad request (for example, host tries to review themselves)

403.description: Only the host of the task can leave reviews for participants

409.description: User has already left a review for this user in this context

get.description: Returns a single review by its ID.

patch.description:
Partially updates an existing review.
Only provided fields will be updated.

delete.description: Deletes an existing review by ID.

get.summary: Get all reviews written by a user
get.description: Returns all reviews for a given user ID (authorUserId).

404.description: User not found or no reviews

get.description:
Returns a list of reviews filtered by type, target and status.
Non-admin users only see APPROVED reviews.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Entity type the reviews are about.

parameters.name: target_id
parameters.description: Target entity ID. Required when `type` is `user` or `organisation`.

400.description: Bad request (for example, missing target_id when required)

patch.summary: Оновити задачу (не можна змінювати host і статус)

message.example: Could not connect to the database

SafeUser.description: User object without password & sensitive tokens (as set in req.user)

organizationName.description: The name of the organization to be created

targetUserId.description: ID of the user being reviewed

targetOrganizationId.description: ID of the organization being reviewed
